title: I’m selling this indicator on TikTok… but giving it free here for a bit
author: KeyStuff9180

comments.author: phillydecat
comments.body: You can't be serious. I can already tell it's UT Bot a free script on trading view lol. You just changed some colors and made it prettier.

replies.author: KeyStuff9180
replies.body: How can you say that ? Try it and then let me know .

replies.author: phillydecat
replies.body: I double checked out of boredom. Turns out UT Bot alerts is exactly the same lol. I wish I could screenshot.

replies.author: KeyStuff9180
replies.body: 🙂 I did not add you to the indicator and what you see is something else.

comments.author: Appropriate-Week-412
comments.body: I would love to use it man!

replies.author: KeyStuff9180
replies.body: Happy to share now ! Please your tradingview name

replies.author: Actual_Resort1892
replies.body: Trading algorithms that executes directly to your account are a lot better than indicators.

replies.author: Appropriate-Week-412
replies.body: Yeah but where can I get something like that? I’m new to the space. I would like to at least start with an indicator that I can use that works so I’m not blindly trading

replies.author: Actual_Resort1892
replies.body:
I know. I’d recommend “open” 
Search for it on TradingView, it a free indicator and it powerful if you know how to use it.
Also insanely easy.

comments.author: Mcfoz
comments.body: Hey, I’d be keen to have it as well!

comments.author: Usual_Oil1390
comments.body: Is there a chance to try this indicator?

comments.author: ConferenceLive7054
comments.body: beep boop. thank your sir metalhands for your work. boop

comments.author: AdditionalClimate952
comments.body: Honestly, TikTok is the last place I’d look for reliable indicators since most of them are just repainted lagging moving averages. And out of curiosity, what kind of data is this actually pulling from is it just price action or does it look at things like on-chain volume and liquidity too?
